response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across diverse industries, including IT consulting and software development. His background in open-source technologies, Linux/Dlang, and leadership in interdisciplinary teams aligns well with the role's requirements. While his German is listed as basic (not C1), his strong technical and communication skills mitigate this concern. His entrepreneurial and mentorship experience further strengthens his fit.
strengths: Extensive senior-level leadership in software development and IT architecture across multiple high-profile companies
Strong technical expertise in open-source technologies, Linux, and modern development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD)
Proven track record in team mentorship, strategic project management, and system design
concerns: German language proficiency is only listed as 'Basic,' falling short of the required C1 level
Limited explicit experience with UML modeling and requirements management in the resume
Some roles (e.g., Naver, Tencent) focus on product development rather than IT consulting or digital sovereignty
